title: CORS issue when fetching data from JSON API
symptom: When trying to fetch data from the specified JSON API, a network error occurs due to CORS restrictions.
applies_when: Fetching data from a different domain
not_this_if: CORS issue is resolved by server-side configuration
root_cause: CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) is a security feature implemented by browsers to prevent web pages from making requests to a different domain than the one that served the web page. If the API does not allow requests from your domain, the browser will block the request.
fix_steps: Select the option 'Make this request through a server' in your API request settings
Retry fetching the data from the JSON API
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Make this request through a server' option to bypass CORS restrictions.
